narrative:
Springfield Twp township has 9,064 registered voters, with 58.2% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 22.0% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 19.9%, a modest Republican lean of 2.1 percentage points.
